description_long: This is a low-top athletic sneaker with a predominantly gray and white camouflage pattern, accented by bright neon green lightning-like graphics on both sides. The upper appears to be made of synthetic textile material, with overlays and a swoosh-shaped design in a darker gray. The shoe features white laces in a standard criss-cross pattern and a white padded collar for comfort. The midsole and outsole are white, with subtle texturing visible along the sidewall. The overall design is sporty and modern, suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A gray and white camouflage sneaker with neon green accents, white laces, and a white sole. The design is sporty and modern, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full camouflage pattern, neon green lightning graphic, and the swoosh-shaped overlay.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the white laces, rounded toe, and the camouflage pattern extending over the toe box.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the mirrored neon green graphic and the swoosh overlay, with the heel and collar visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the padded heel collar, heel tab, and the continuation of the camouflage pattern around the back.
attribute_logo: Swoosh-shaped overlay on both sides in dark gray; 'NIKE' text on tongue in black.
